examples: If good people do nothing there is a real possibility that an uninformed citizenry will extinguish the precious embers of medical progress.
He used the medium of radio when he wanted to enlist public support or reassure the citizenry.
Attention should now move to the citizenry.
This vast and diverse citizenry will not always agree on every issue -- nor should we.
As for the citizenry, Baton Rougeans had an instinctive distaste for the more famous town.
